SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils
パッケージ org.commonutils.util

クラス CollectionSupport

java.lang.Object
org.commonutils.util.CollectionSupport
public final class CollectionSupport extends Object
Static helpers shared by arbitrary Collection implementations (List, Set, Queue, …): presence checks, safe size(Collection), containment tests between collections, and ordered endpoints via SequencedCollection where applicable.

Null handling

Unless stated otherwise, a null collection reference is treated as "missing":
  • Predicates such as isEmpty(Collection) treat null like an empty collection.
  • Methods that return an element or a count map null or empty inputs to null or 0; see each method for exact rules.
This matches MapSupport and StringSupport conventions (and differs from calling Collection instance methods on null, which would throw NullPointerException).

Exceptions

These helpers do not throw for ordinary null or empty arguments: they return false, 0, or null as documented. They are intended for guard-friendly call sites. Implementations still delegate to the supplied collections; a broken Iterator or other contract violation in user code may still throw at runtime. size(Collection) throws IllegalArgumentException when Collection.size() returns a negative value.

Containment helpers

containsAny(Collection, Collection) and containsAll(Collection, Collection) answer membership questions between two collections. containsAll(Collection, Collection) is null-safe wrapper around Collection.containsAll(Collection); when either argument is null, the result is false. An empty candidates collection yields true for containsAll (every required element is vacuously present), and false for containsAny (nothing to match).

First and last elements

getFirst(Collection) prefers SequencedCollection.getFirst() when the argument is a SequencedCollection; otherwise it uses the first element from an Iterator. getLast(SequencedCollection) uses SequencedCollection.getLast() and applies to ordered collections such as lists, deques, and LinkedHashSet.

Examples


 // Safe sizing for possibly-uninitialized field
 int n = CollectionSupport.size(maybeIds);

 // Membership without null checks
 if (CollectionSupport.containsAny(granted, required)) {
     // at least one required permission is granted
 }

 if (CollectionSupport.isEmpty(rows)) {
     return List.of();
 }

Nullability annotations (Nullable, NonNull) document contracts on signatures.

Numeric constraints (NonNegative, Positive) document intended primitive ranges for callers; size(Collection) enforces NonNegative at runtime when Collection.size() returns a negative value.

関連項目:
  • Collection.isEmpty()
  • Collection.containsAll(Collection)
  • SequencedCollection.getFirst()
  • SequencedCollection.getLast()

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    static boolean
    containsAll(@Nullable Collection<?> source, @Nullable Collection<?> candidates)
    Returns true if source contains every element of candidates, using Collection.containsAll(Collection).
    static boolean
    containsAny(@Nullable Collection<?> source, @Nullable Collection<?> candidates)
    Returns true if source contains at least one element that appears in candidates, using Collection.contains(Object) semantics (equality per the source collection).
    static <T> T
    getFirst(@Nullable Collection<? extends T> collection)
    Returns the first element of collection, or null when collection is null or has no elements.
    static <T> T
    getLast(@Nullable SequencedCollection<? extends T> collection)
    Returns the last element of collection, or null when collection is null or empty.
    static boolean
    isEmpty(@Nullable Collection<?> collection)
    Returns true if collection is null or Collection.isEmpty().
    static boolean
    isNotEmpty(@Nullable Collection<?> collection)
    Negation of isEmpty(Collection): true when collection is non-null and has at least one element.
    static @org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative int
    size(@Nullable Collection<?> collection)
    Returns collection.size() when collection is non-null; otherwise 0.

    クラスから継承されたメソッド java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • メソッドの詳細

    • isEmpty

      public static boolean isEmpty(@Nullable @Nullable Collection<?> collection)
      Returns true if collection is null or Collection.isEmpty().
      パラメータ:
      collection - collection to test, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if collection is null or has no elements
      関連項目:
      • isNotEmpty(Collection)
      • size(Collection)

    • isNotEmpty

      public static boolean isNotEmpty(@Nullable @Nullable Collection<?> collection)
      Negation of isEmpty(Collection): true when collection is non-null and has at least one element.
      パラメータ:
      collection - collection to test, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if collection is not null and not empty
      関連項目:
      • isEmpty(Collection)

    • size

      @NonNegative public static @org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative int size(@Nullable @Nullable Collection<?> collection)
      Returns collection.size() when collection is non-null; otherwise 0. Use instead of collection == null ? 0 : collection.size() at call sites.
      パラメータ:
      collection - collection to measure, may be null
      戻り値:
      element count, or 0 when collection is null
      例外:
      IllegalArgumentException - when collection is non-null and Collection.size() is negative
      関連項目:
      • isEmpty(Collection)

    • getFirst

      @Nullable public static <T> T getFirst(@Nullable @Nullable Collection<? extends T> collection)
      Returns the first element of collection, or null when collection is null or has no elements.

      When the first stored element is null (allowed by some collection implementations), this method also returns null; callers cannot distinguish that case from an empty collection using only the return value.

      型パラメータ:
      T - element type
      パラメータ:
      collection - collection to read from, may be null
      戻り値:
      first element, or null if missing
      関連項目:
      • getLast(SequencedCollection)

    • getLast

      @Nullable public static <T> T getLast(@Nullable @Nullable SequencedCollection<? extends T> collection)
      Returns the last element of collection, or null when collection is null or empty.

      When the last stored element is null, this method also returns null; callers cannot distinguish that case from an empty collection using only the return value.

      型パラメータ:
      T - element type
      パラメータ:
      collection - sequenced collection to read from, may be null
      戻り値:
      last element, or null if missing
      関連項目:
      • getFirst(Collection)

    • containsAny

      public static boolean containsAny(@Nullable @Nullable Collection<?> source, @Nullable @Nullable Collection<?> candidates)
      Returns true if source contains at least one element that appears in candidates, using Collection.contains(Object) semantics (equality per the source collection).

      When either collection is null or empty, or candidates is empty, the result is false.

      パラメータ:
      source - collection to search in, may be null
      candidates - values to look for, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if at least one candidate is contained in source
      関連項目:
      • containsAll(Collection, Collection)

    • containsAll

      public static boolean containsAll(@Nullable @Nullable Collection<?> source, @Nullable @Nullable Collection<?> candidates)
      Returns true if source contains every element of candidates, using Collection.containsAll(Collection). When source or candidates is null, returns false. When candidates is empty, returns true (vacuous truth).
      パラメータ:
      source - collection to search in, may be null
      candidates - required elements, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if every candidate is contained in source
      関連項目:
      • containsAny(Collection, Collection)
      • Collection.containsAll(Collection)
